Miracle-Gro Liquid Plant Food - All Purpose video Merchant video Previous page Grows plants twice as big Feed your plants the nutrients they need to grow twice as big (versus unfed plants)! The superfood for your plants Contains Humifirst which is rich in organic matter - stimulating growth and root formation. Next page 1 Grows Twice As Big 2 Superfood For Your Plants 3 Results In 7 Days 4 Pet & Child Friendly Miracle-Gro plant food is renowned for its ‘grows twice as big’ results A concentrated liquid plant food containing a growth stimulant rich in organic matter, Miracle-Gro All Purpose Concentrated Liquid Plant Food is the superfood your plant needs. Creates bountiful plants, flowers and vegetables by stimulating growth and yield, root formation and improving resistance to environmental stresses. Guaranteed visibly healthier, happier plants in just 7 days. Why should I use Miracle-Gro All Purpose Concentrated Liquid Plant Food? Plants need more than just water, they need the right balance of essential nutrients to grow and bloom their best. Miracle-Gro feeds your plants the nutrients they need that are ​easily absorbed to grow your plants twice as big versus unfed plants! Where can I use Miracle-Gro All Purpose Concentrated Liquid Plant Food? Perfect for pots and containers, hanging baskets, beds and borders. Miracle-Gro All Purpose Concentrated Liquid Plant Food can be used indoors and outdoors. Suitable for use as directed in areas where children and pets have access. When should I use Miracle-Gro All Purpose Concentrated Liquid Plant Food? For outdoor plants, use Miracle-Gro All Purpose Concentrated Liquid Plant Food between March and September, when plants are actively growing. For indoor plants, can be used all year round when plants are actively growing. How do I use Miracle-Gro All Purpose Concentrated Liquid Plant Food? Add ½ a cap to 1 litre of water. Soak the soil around the base of each plant. Reduce rate to ¼ cap per litre of water for houseplants, sensitive plants, small or young plants. Feed every 1-2 weeks when plants are actively growing. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Always wear appropriate protective equipment, such as gloves and eye protection, when handling this fertilizer. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not ingest. If accidentally ingested, seek medical advice. In case of skin or eye contact, rinse immediately with water. Store in a cool, dry place. Follow manufacturer instructions for application. Improper use may harm plants or the environment.
